raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work (AdaGrad analysis by Duchi, Hazan, and Singer) and articulates the delta in terms of extending it to the non-convex composite setting.",
    "R1.7": "The output audits every load-bearing citation, including the arXiv preprint and journal version of AdaGrad, and flags no missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims by noting that it did not verify the accuracy of the claimed rates, attribution to Reddi et al., arXiv identifier, or reported empirical figures.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and does not drift from the scope of the cleanup task.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original content.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including replacements of ASCII placeholders with conventional symbols and minor phrasing adjustments."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work (AdaGrad analysis by Duchi, Hazan, and Singer) and articulates the delta in terms of extending it to the non-convex composite setting.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation, including the arXiv preprint and journal version of AdaGrad, and flags no missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims by noting that it did not verify the accuracy of the claimed rates, attribution to Reddi et al., arXiv identifier, or reported empirical figures.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) and does not drift from the scope of the cleanup task.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including replacements of ASCII placeholders with conventional symbols and minor phrasing adjustments.
